title: Block Corruption
description: Adds a Block Corruption (similar to Alan Becker's) to your world!
body:
Did you watch Alan Becker's video "Hardcore Manhunt" and thought, "I wish I could have that thing destroying *my* world"? Well now you can!

This mod adds a corruption which is designed to mimic Alan Becker's corruption. It spawns randomly in the world and then spreads towards players, turning the landscape black, causing blocks to flicker ominously, damaging entities, and generally being a nuisance.
